title: About Greg Smith MP | Greg Smith
headings: h3: Greg Smith MP Mid Buckinghamshire
text_excerpt: About Greg Smith MP | Greg Smith Skip to main content Main navigation About Greg Smith MP News Campaigns Listening to you Parliament Surgeries Contact About Greg Smith MP Tweet Hello, I’m Greg Smith MP, and I’m honoured to have been re-elected as the Conservative Member of Parliament for the new Mid Buckinghamshire constituency in 2024 and I’m excited to continue serving you and your family. Previously, I had the privilege of representing the Buckingham constituency for four and a half years. My family and I are proud to call the village of Chearsley home. I live here with my wonderful family: my wife, Annalise, my eight-year-old son Jacob, six-year-old Charlie, and four-year-old Rupert. Before my election to Parliament, I built a career in print, design, and marketing, working with clients across manufacturing, medical technology, and charitable sectors. Throughout my career, I have been driven by a commitment to get things done - a principle that continues to guide me in Parliament. Locally, I’m dedicated to protecting our beautiful countryside. I have long opposed the environmentally damaging HS2 railway project, and I’m proud to have successfully campaigned to stop the Oxford-Cambridge Expressway. While I understand the need for more housing across the UK, I strongly believe that we should focus on developing brownfield sites in towns and cities, rather than encroaching on our precious green spaces. As a father, I understand firsthand the challenges of childcare costs, which often hold parents back from rejoining the workforce. That’s why I was pleased to see the previous Conservative Government deliver the largest-ever expansion of free childcare. Every child deserves the opportunity to reach their full potential, and I’m committed to making that vision a reality. I am also passionate about preserving the British countryside and supporting our farmers. I do what I can on my wife’s family farm and am a strong advocate for our rural way of life. As a lifelong McLaren supporter, I also enjoy Formula 1 and am especially proud that my former Buckingham constituency was home to roughly half of the iconic Silverstone track. Since 2024, I have been a Shadow Transport, Shadow Business, and Shadow Energy Security and Net Zero Minister, and you can see all of my Opposition front bench contributions from the Despatch Box across my social media channels. In 2026, I became the Parliamentary (Commons) Chair of the Conservative Friends of Israel. I’m here to serve you, and I am always eager to hear from my constituents. Thank you for taking the time to learn a bit more about me, "I've seen Greg Smith working as a strong constituency-focussed MP over the past four and a half years. Having represented much of the new Mid Bucks seat myself in the past, I know Greg will do you proud, being out and about in our community and getting our voice heard in Westminster." — Rt. Hon.
